title: betula × sargentii
intro: Betula × sargentii, also known as Sargent's birch, is a hybrid plant species between the paper birch (Betula papyrifera) and the river birch (Betula nana or Betula papyrifera var. cordifolia). The medicinal properties of Betula × sargentii include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Betula × sargentii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin issues and promote wound healing.
